description: 16 numerical estimation questions for circuit duplication evaluation. Each has English and NKO versions. NKO uses native NKO digits (U+07C0-U+07C9).

probes.english: If you have 156 mangoes and give away 89, how many remain?
probes.nko: ߣߌ߫ ߌ ߓߍ߫ ߡߊ߲ߜߏ ߁߅߆ ߘߐ ߌ ߞߊ߬ ߈߉ ߘߌ߫ ߖߏ߬ߟߌ ߕߏ߬ ߊ?

probes.english: A farmer plants 8 rows with 15 seeds each. How many seeds total?
probes.nko: ߛߍ߬ߣߍ ߞߍ߬ߟߊ ߞߊ߬ ߛߎ߲ ߈ ߛߌ߲ ߁߅ ߛߎ߲ ߞߋߟߋ߲ ߞߐ. ߛߌ߲ ߓߍ߯ ߦߋ ߖߏ߬ߟߌ?

probes.english: If a journey takes 3 hours at 60 km/h, how far is it?
probes.nko: ߣߌ߫ ߕߊ߬ߡߊ ߓߍ߫ ߟߍ߬ߙ ߃ ߕߊ ߞߟ ߆߀ ߟߍ߬ߙ ߞߋߟߋ߲ ߞߐ ߦߋ ߦߊ߲߬ ߖߏ߬ߟߌ?

probes.english: What is the sum of all numbers from 1 to 10?
probes.nko: ߖߊ߬ߕߋ ߓߍ߯ ߁ ߞߊ ߕߊ߬ ߁߀ ߟߊ ߝߊ ߦߋ ߖߏ߬ߟߌ?

probes.english: A market sells 45 kg of rice at 500 CFA per kg. What is the total price?
probes.nko: ߖߊ߬ߓߌ ߞߊ߬ ߡߊ߬ߟߏ ߞߜ ߄߅ ߝߍ߬ ߛߋ߬ߝߊ ߅߀߀ ߞߜ ߞߋߟߋ߲ ߦߋ. ߛߏ߲ ߓߍ߯ ߦߋ ߖߏ߬ߟߌ?

probes.english: If 3 people share 750 CFA equally, how much does each get?
probes.nko: ߡߐ߱ ߃ ߞߊ߬ ߛߋ߬ߝߊ ߇߅߀ ߕߟߊ ߞߍ߲ ߞߋߟߋ߲ ߠߊ. ߞߋ ߞߋߟߋ߲ ߓߍ ߖߏ߬ߟߌ ߛߐ߬ ߊ?

probes.english: A rectangle is 12 meters long and 5 meters wide. What is its area?
probes.nko: ߞߐ߲ ߝߊ߲ ߦߋ ߡߕ ߁߂ ߊ ߓߏ߲ ߦߋ ߡߕ ߅. ߊ߬ ߝߊ߲ ߖߊ ߦߋ ߖߏ߬ߟߌ?

probes.english: If a taxi charges 200 CFA base plus 50 CFA per km, how much for 12 km?
probes.nko: ߕߊ߬ߞߛߌ ߓߍ ߛߋ߬ߝߊ ߂߀߀ ߕߊ ߛߋ߬ߝߊ ߅߀ ߞߟ ߞߋߟߋ߲ ߞߐ. ߞߟ ߁߂ ߛߏ߲ ߦߋ ߖߏ߬ߟߌ?

probes.english: What is 2 to the power of 10?
A circle has radius 7. What is its approximate area? (use pi = 22/7)
probes.nko: ߕߎ߬ߟߊ߲ ߦߊ ߓߍ ߦ ߇. ߊ ߝߊ߲ ߖߊ ߦߋ ߖߏ߬ߟߌ?
